hero_headline: Built this 38 min after Linear's Founding Product Engineer JD hit my agent.
hero_subline: I've used Linear since the Ralph version. I run my own 7-agent production system on Claude. This role is the intersection — here's how I'd ship in week 1.
pitch_oneliner: Week 1: identify three friction points in current Linear AI features by talking to 5 power users, scope the smallest one that ships within sprint, build it as a feature flag.

jd_match.requirement: Founding-engineer mindset on AI product surface
jd_match.proof: Founded and shipped empresaAI — full-stack 7-agent system from scratch, in production 24/7
ManoloBot ships one Next.js + TypeScript app per day to Vercel

jd_match.requirement: Direct customer interaction in product discovery
jd_match.proof: Head of Product at Olyverse (Geneva) — scaled to 50k+ users by ruthless prioritization based on direct user research
